The '''nyork''' was a small, hard-shelled, carnivorous [[Clam/Legends|clam]] native to the [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They "nipped" with their mouths located inside their shells, and would jump out of the water at whatever seemed to be prey to them. The nyork's main predators included the [[otta]], the [[Pikobi/Legends|pikobi]], and the [[Blarth/Legends|blarth]]. [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] also ate nyorks, usually wrapping the meat in [[nave]] leaves. [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] was eating a nyork when he was rescued by [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].
